case_title: THE SHORENSTEIN CO. A CALIF. CORP. vs. WORLD FRIENDSHIP SOCIETY, A CALIF. CORP. et al

docket_entries.description: MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE SHORENSTEIN CO. A CALIF. CORP. COURT TRIAL SET FOR DEC-09-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT WORLD FRIENDSHIP SOCIETY, A CALIF. CORP.

JUDGE WICK, BETH WILBER - CLERK, DONNA SULLIVAN - REPORTER: C/C FOR CT. TRIAL, JEFFREY P. WOO APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF, KEITH WATSON APPEARED ON BEHALF DEFT. BUT SINCE WORLD FRIEND SHIP SOCIETY IS A CORPORATION, MR. WATSON WAS NOT ABLE TO ACT IN PRO PER; JUDGMENT FOR PTLF, PLTF. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.
APPLICATION FOR STAY OF EVICTION AT ENSISTENCE OF LITIGANT;NO ORDER FILED BY DEFENDANT WORLD FRIENDSHIP SOCIETY, A CALIF. CORP.
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT WORLD FRIENDSHIP SOCIETY, A CALIF. CORP.
PHOTOCOPY FOR PLAINTIFF THE SHORENSTEIN CO. A CALIF. CORP.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WORLD FRIENDSHIP SOCIETY, A CALIF. CORP. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 25 TAYLOR STREET, SUITE 621, SF, CA, LEASE FORFEITED, PLAINTIFF TO RECOVER FROM DEFT. COSTS OF SUIT INCLUDING REASONALBE ATTYS FEES.
